description_long: This is a small, white ceramic cup with a rounded body and a single, sturdy handle. The cup features a printed black-and-white comic panel on one side, depicting a cartoon character lying down with Italian text in a speech bubble. The surface of the cup is smooth and matte, with a gentle taper from the wide rim to a narrower base. The handle is ergonomically shaped for easy gripping, and the interior is plain and unadorned. The cup is designed for holding hot beverages such as coffee or tea and is typical of those found in urban cafes or kitchens.
description: A white ceramic cup with a smooth matte finish, a single handle, and a printed comic panel on one side.
description_view_0: The cup is viewed directly from the handle side, showing the full handle and the plain white surface.
description_view_1: This view highlights the comic panel with Italian text and the cartoon character, as well as the handle on the left.
description_view_2: The back of the cup is visible, showing a plain white surface with no handle or artwork.
description_view_3: The cup is seen from the side opposite the handle, displaying the smooth, unadorned surface and the handle on the right.
